subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! All praise be unto Thee for having given Bahá to drink of the cup of Thy decree. By Thy might, O Sovereign [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی لک الحمد بما سقیت البهاء کاس القضاء فو عزتک یا مالک
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
